prompt: Board meeting — we need to hire a part-time content writer. What should we look for and how should we position the role?

assertions.text: Output contains headers for all 3 agents
Recruiter speaks first or second (domain owner for hiring topics)
Each agent turn is 60 words or fewer
Board Recommendation section exists and is 80 words or fewer
Each agent surfaces a realistic risk or counterpoint from their domain
After approval section, asks whether to save as document or keep in chat
